## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (test‑first for new behaviour / bug fixes)
- [ ] `npm run format:check` and `npm run lint` pass
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Followed the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
